case_title: KOSEWIC,JOHN J. vs. PORRES, ANA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC,JOHN J.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC,JOHN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORRES, ANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5715 MISSION ST, SF, CA $6,299.00 RENT, $587.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,886.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLEASE SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSEWIC,JOHN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORRES, ANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5715 MISSION STREET, LEASE FORFEITED
